phrases.text_local: Pode indicar um restaurante italiano nas redondezas?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih ee-tuh-LEEAHN-noo NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao rececionista, ele poderá recomendar restaurantes nas redondezas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh, EH-lih poh-deh-RAH reh-koo-mayng-DAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the receptionist, he can recommend restaurants nearby.

responses.english: Ask the receptionist, he can recommend restaurants nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh, EH-lih poh-deh-RAH reh-koo-mayng-DAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao rececionista, ele poderá recomendar restaurantes nas redondezas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wool looms are displayed
phrases.text_local: Onde estão expostos os teares de lã?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN ehsh-PAWS-toosh OOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN?
phrases.cultural_note: Displayed looms illustrate the region's traditional wool weaving practices.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os Teares de Lã.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Wool Looms.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Wool Looms.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os Teares de Lã.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wool looms are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os teares de lã?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional wool looms reflect Nazaré's fishing community textile heritage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the caulking workshop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Oficina de Calafetagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH kuh-luh-fih-TAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: The caulking workshop is one of the preserved traditional maritime workshops in the ecomuseum, reflecting Nazaré's fishing heritage.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao rececionista na Casa do Ecomuseu.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh NUH KAH-zuh DOO eh-koo-moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the receptionist at the Ecomuseum House.

responses.english: Ask the receptionist at the Ecomuseum House.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh NUH KAH-zuh DOO eh-koo-moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Pergunte ao rececionista na Casa do Ecomuseu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wool looms are displayed
phrases.text_local: Onde estão expostos os Teares de Lã?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN ehsh-PAWS-toosh OOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN?
phrases.cultural_note: The wool looms are part of the ecomuseum's exhibition on traditional weaving, a local craft.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à receção do Ecomuseu para obter indicações sobre a localização dos Teares de Lã.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN DOO eh-koo-moo-ZEHOO PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Ecomuseum reception for directions to the location of the Wool Looms.

responses.english: Go to the Ecomuseum reception for directions to the location of the Wool Looms.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN DOO eh-koo-moo-ZEHOO PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOOSH TEEAH-rihsh DIH LAHN.
responses.local: Dirija-se à receção do Ecomuseu para obter indicações sobre a localização dos Teares de Lã.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the caulking workshop is
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar a oficina de calafetagem?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH kuh-luh-fih-TAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: This workshop preserves traditional boat repair techniques vital to coastal life.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Oficina de Calafetagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH kuh-luh-fih-TAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Caulking Workshop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Caulking Workshop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH aw-fee-SEE-nuh DIH kuh-luh-fih-TAH-zhayng.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Oficina de Calafetagem.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fishing boat collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a coleção de barcos de pesca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH BAH-ruh-koosh DIH PEHSH-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The fishing boat collection is a highlight of the museum, reflecting Nazaré's maritime heritage.

likely_response.translation_en: In the outdoor courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: In the outdoor courtyard, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the traditional bread oven is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o forno de pão tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW FOH-ruh-noo DIH POWN truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The oven demonstrates historic baking methods used by local families.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fishing boat collection is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a coleção de barcos de pesca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH BAH-ruh-koosh DIH PEHSH-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The collection showcases historic fishing vessels central to Nazaré's identity.
